title: Elevate NYC this week - Top Tips
excerpt:

posts.author: Juan (Juan Cisneros)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey NYC!

We are thrilled to host Elevate 2024 this week! On Wednesday, the Solutions Engineering team will be doing a session on Top 10 Tips to get the most out of monday.com! What are some of your tips you’d like to share with the community?

P.S. I’ll come back here at the end of the week and share the ones we present along with a package to install locally.

posts.author: akm (angelica kemper)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Juan – may I get a copy of the top 10 tips from NYC from earlier this week? Great work, team - and many thanks in advance.

posts.author: gary598byers (Gary Byers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!

Looking forward to Elevate 2024 and the Solutions Engineering team’s session on Top 10 Tips for (link unavailable)! Here are a few tips I’d like to share:

  1. Utilize custom dashboards for a bird’s-eye view of multiple projects.

  2. Leverage automation recipes to streamline repetitive tasks.

  3. Use @mentions for seamless team communication.

  4. Create custom workflows with integrations (e.g., Zapier, Slack).

  5. Set up clear permissions and access controls. mySedgwick.com

Would love to see the full list after the session! Please share the package and slides.

Some specific questions:

  • Will the session cover any new features or updates?

  • Are there any industry-specific tips or use cases?

  • Will there be a Q&A session or demo?

Thanks for organizing Elevate 2024! Excited to learn and network.

posts.author: Juan (Juan Cisneros)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi y’all!
Thanks for you patience, we just had our Elevate in Australia last week so was waiting to post this but here is the install link:

auth.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.

and a video of instructions here: Elevate Conference Tips Installation Guide | Loom
